summary.narrative: Governor Sanders focused on education reform (Arkansas LEARNS), tax cuts (3 reductions in top rate from 4.9% to 3.9%), workforce development (Arkansas LAUNCH), criminal justice measures, and economic development. Implemented several campaign priorities in first two years.
summary.grade_rationale: Strong delivery on tax cuts and education overhaul; significant progress on workforce platform; some controversy on education implementation; limited federal/legislative barriers overcome relative to executive authority.

promises.normalized: Education overhaul through Arkansas LEARNS program
Income tax reduction from 4.9% to 3.9% top rate
Criminal justice expansion and death penalty methods

data_gaps: Specific election margin from 2022 governor race
Detailed breakdown of Arkansas LEARNS implementation outcomes and metrics
Arkansas LAUNCH user adoption and job placement statistics
Public approval ratings and satisfaction metrics
Details on executive orders issued and their impacts
Complete list of bill signings and legislative agenda prioritization
Budget allocations and spending outcomes for major initiatives
Comparative analysis of tax cut economic effects
Teacher and education stakeholder response assessment
